ThingsGateway.Gateway.Management.Redunda.SwitchPrimaryState: Cannot connect to redundant site, local machine will switch to normal state
ThingsGateway.Gateway.Management.Redunda.SwitchStandbyState: Primary site has recovered, local machine (standby) will switch to standby state
ThingsGateway.Gateway.Management.Redunda.SwitchNormalState: Local machine (primary site) will switch to normal state
ThingsGateway.Gateway.Management.Redunda.ErrorSynchronizingData: Synchronize data to standby site error

ThingsGateway.Gateway.Management.Redunda.IsStartBusinessDevice: Enable Business Device in Standby Site
ThingsGateway.Gateway.Management.Redunda.Restart: The redundant service will be restarted soon
